sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n75066" key="*)ori/bakxos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">Ὀρί-βακχος</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ῐ]</pron>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n75066.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">Mountain-Bacchus,</tr_> because his orgies were held there, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0024.tlg001.perseus-grc1:1:24" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Opp.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">C.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.24</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
